rfl)

simp only [Finset.mem_insert, Finset.mem_singleton] at ha ⊢
      <;> aesop

· exact AKnave
      · exact BKnave
      · exact CKnave

· -- Case a = A
          exact AKnave
        · -- Case a = B
          exact BKnave
        · -- Case a = C
          exact CKnave
      exact h₂

· exact AKnave
      · exact BKnave
      · exact CKnave
₃

· -- Case a = A
        simp_all [Knight, Knave]
        <;> aesop
      · -- Case a = B
        simp_all [Knight, Knave]
        <;> aesop
      · -- Case a = C
        simp_all [Knight, Knave]
        <;> aesop
  }

· -- Case a = A
        simp_all [Finset.mem_singleton]
        <;>
        (try contradiction) <;>
        (try aesop)
      · -- Case a = B
        simp_all [Finset.mem_singleton]
        <;>
        (try contradiction) <;>
        (try aesop)
      · -- Case a = C
        simp_all [Finset.mem_singleton]
        <;>
        (try contradiction) <;>
        (try aesop)

· -- Case a = A
        simp_all [Finset.mem_insert, Finset.mem_singleton]
        <;> aesop
      · -- Case a = B
        simp_all [Finset.mem_insert, Finset.mem_singleton]
        <;> aesop
      · -- Case a = C
        simp_all [Finset.mem_insert, Finset.mem_singleton]
        <;> aesop
